_comment: Perception Engine integration registry for localAIStack personal health domain.
Docker:   Add to perception-engine service environment in docker-compose.yml
This file defines the PE source mappings that route iOS HealthKit and CareKit
payloads to the correct perceptual space regions for localAIStack machines.
Wire format matches RealityEngine_AI TypeScript PE (server.ts integration registry).
Source mapping IDs follow PE conventions:
Sensor regions match Python constants in core/reality_bridge.py and
machine input windows in data/machines/. Update all three together.
HEALTHKIT_BRIDGE_TOKEN / CAREKIT_BRIDGE_TOKEN env vars on the PE control
authentication. Unset = no-auth dev mode. Set = body bridgeToken required.

integrations._comment: Receives POST /api/integrations/healthkit/ingest from localHealthkitBridge iOS module. Pre-normalised 0.0/1.0 band values (iOS bridge computes band logic; PE writes passthrough).
Receives POST /api/integrations/carekit/ingest from iOS CareKit sync. Pre-normalised ratio values [0.0, 1.0] computed from OCKStore outcomes.

sourceMappings._comment: HealthKit — heart rate. iOS bridge pre-computes band: 1.0 if HR in [60,100] bpm, else 0.0.
sourceMappings.name: localai/health/hr_ok

sourceMappings._comment: HealthKit — HRV SDNN. iOS bridge pre-computes band: 1.0 if SDNN >= 30 ms, else 0.0.
sourceMappings.name: localai/health/hrv_ok

sourceMappings._comment: HealthKit — sleep analysis. iOS bridge aggregates InBed/Asleep stages, sends 1.0 if total >= 6.5 h, else 0.0.
sourceMappings.name: localai/health/sleep_ok

sourceMappings._comment: CareKit — medication adherence ratio. Computed as: doses_taken / doses_scheduled in rolling 24 h window.
sourceMappings.name: localai/carekit/med_adherence

sourceMappings._comment: CareKit — daily task completion ratio. tasks_completed / tasks_scheduled today.
sourceMappings.name: localai/carekit/task_completion

sourceMappings._comment: CareKit — symptom sentinel. 1.0 = no symptoms or severity < moderate. Invert symptom severity: symptom_ok = max(0, 1 - severity_normalized).
sourceMappings.name: localai/carekit/symptom_ok

bandThresholds._comment: Must match Python constants in core/reality_bridge.py and bandThresholds in config/integrations.healthkit-localai.json.
